name: Tiger Mosquito

attacks.name: Poke
attacks.tell: It pauses in the air for a moment before thrusting straight forward.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or sidestep as soon as you see the pause.
attacks.notes: Its simplest stab, and it still steals life.

attacks.name: 3-Poke Combo
attacks.tell: It links three fast jabs with very little downtime between them.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not counter after the first; wait until the third stab finishes.
attacks.notes: Its best way to recover health if you let the full chain connect.

attacks.name: Loop Divebomb
attacks.tell: It creates space, loops out wide, and returns with a deeper diving stab.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not chase it while it loops; wait for the return and dodge when it commits.
attacks.notes: Its hardest-hitting move and the easiest one for it to punish late reactions.

description: A much deadlier upper-yard version of the regular mosquito. The move set is familiar, but every hit is stronger and the lifesteal remains intact.
behavior: It flies and lands much like a regular mosquito and will still sip aphid honeydew when given the chance. In combat it keeps the basic poke, triple combo, and long looping dive attack.
interactionWithPlayer: It is always hostile. If it lands enough hits, it can fill its blood sack and drop it on death, making long fights more rewarding but also more dangerous.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually does not fight other creatures, though it will drink aphid honeydew if it passes nearby.
strategy: The pattern is the same one you already know from normal mosquitoes, but missed blocks are punished far harder here. Fresh, chopping, and slashing are excellent, and a strong tier 3 weapon reduces the life steal threat a lot.

loot.notes: Only if filled by attacking the player

specialTraits: Every hit steals life. If it draws enough blood, it can drop a blood sack on death.
